name: Motor insurance theft claim process
description: User's car was stolen — needs to know the claim process

input.message: My car was stolen last night. I have comprehensive car insurance. What do I do? What is the process to claim insurance? I am very stressed.

notes: Steps: 1. File FIR immediately at nearest police station, 2. Inform insurer within 24 hours, 3. Inform RTO (Regional Transport Office), 4. Submit: FIR copy, RC book, policy document, original keys (both sets), driver's license. Insurer investigates for 30 days. Claim = IDV minus depreciation. Should be empathetic to stress.
